ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Unique race number assigned to the participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the participant (e.g., M40, MO) */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the running club the participant belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the participant has */,
  "shirt_size" TEXT /* T-shirt size for race kits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each running club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the running club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the running club */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the club */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the club was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the club's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the race event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the race starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the race ends */,
  "event_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race (e.g., 5K, 10K) */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the race is held */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "race_director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event the participant is registering for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the event */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee paid by the participant */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the registration information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event the participant participated in */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Official finish time of the participant */,
  "chip_time" TEXT /* Chip time recorded for the participant */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace of the participant */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON object storing split times at various checkpoints */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "race_position" INTEGER /* Overall race position of the participant */,
  "category_position" INTEGER /* Category position of the participant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Specific category (e.g., M40, M50) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the position was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the position was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_positions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_positions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_spectators" (
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectator */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event the spectator is following */,
  "spectator_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the spectator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the spectator */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the participant (e.g., friend, family) */,
  "follower_participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the spectator is following */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the spectator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the spectator's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_spectators_follower_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_spectators_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "checkpoint_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant passed a checkpoint */,
  "current_position" INTEGER /* Current position of the participant */,
  "checkpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the checkpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the progress was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_progress_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_progress_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., general, technical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the organizer (e.g., race director, volunteer coordinator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the organizer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the organizer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sponsor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sponsor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Race position that wins the prize */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Description of the prize */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the prize (e.g., monetary value, points) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prize was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prize's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_prizes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
